title: Find My Device - Play/Stop - multiple tries and exits
scenario: Find My Device play/stop tone fails to behave correctly after repeated start/stop cycles in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a Poly Bluetooth headset connected.
5. If prompted, allow GPS location access.
6. Tap the Play button to start the Find My Device tone.
7. Tap the Stop button to stop the Find My Device tone.
expected: The Find My Device tone plays immediately when Play is tapped and stops immediately when Stop is tapped. The sound behaves correctly and consistently after every start/stop cycle.
